backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the game backend with character creation/management, item/marketplace storage, access control, and dungeon result handling for a RPG game on ICP.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that monster defense/armor values were reduced by 80% in `frontend/src/data/monsters.ts` to fix combat balance for low-level players.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and recent changes of each component, hook, engine, and data file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Abyss Ascendant app that mounts the React root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing global app state (authentication, character selection, dungeon flow, level-up modals) and wiring together all screens and backend query hooks.
frontend/src/components/AbilitySelectMod: Modal component for selecting and toggling character abilities up to the character's total ability point limit, grouped and filtered by archetype.
frontend/src/components/CharacterCreatio: React component for creating a new character, allowing the user to set a name, realm, and allocate stat points, then generating starter equipment and persisting the character via backend mutations.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSelectS: Displays a list of existing characters with health bars and delete options, handles loading/error states, and provides navigation to select or create a character.
frontend/src/components/CharacterSheet.t: Renders a detailed character sheet showing stats, XP progress, abilities, and realm/status, with modals for spending unspent stat points and selecting abilities.
frontend/src/components/DungeonRunScreen: Runs a dungeon combat simulation on mount, animates the combat log line by line, then saves results to the backend and calls completion or death callbacks.
frontend/src/components/DungeonSelectScr: UI for selecting dungeon mode and monster level before starting a run, showing XP/drop rate feedback and generating monsters based on the chosen level.
frontend/src/components/HealthBar.tsx: Reusable health bar component that renders a color-coded progress bar (high/mid/low) with HP values in both compact and standard display modes.
Renders a tabbed inventory UI (Inventory, Stash, Equipped) allowing the player to view, select, equip/unequip, and move items between tabs. Uses ItemCard for item display and exposes action callbacks for parent state management.
frontend/src/components/ItemTooltip.tsx: Displays a styled tooltip card for a GeneratedItem, showing its rarity-colored name, type, base damage/defense, and affix stats with icons. Also exports an ItemCard variant used in grid layouts.
frontend/src/components/LeaderboardScree: Shows a mock seasonal leaderboard with Softcore and Hardcore realm tabs, listing player rank, name, class tier, level, XP, and alive/dead status. Real backend leaderboard data is not yet integrated.
frontend/src/components/LevelUpModal.tsx: Modal dialog that lets the player allocate unspent stat points (STR, DEX, INT, VIT) earned from leveling up, then confirms the updated base stats back to the parent via a callback.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Full-screen login page with Internet Identity authentication, displaying the game logo, feature highlights, and a login/logout button with animated particle effects.
frontend/src/components/MarketplaceScree: React component for a player marketplace with browse and sell tabs, allowing users to list inventory items for sale at a set price and buy items listed by other players.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky header navigation component that renders nav tabs for all game screens, displays character name/level/realm/HP bar, and provides back-to-character-select and logout buttons.
frontend/src/components/ProfessionsPlace: Static placeholder screen for the Professions feature showing four upcoming crafting disciplines (Smithing, Alchemy, Tinkering, Gathering) with a 'Coming Soon' badge.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that forces new users to choose a validated adventurer username (2–20 alphanumeric characters) before proceeding, persisting it via the saveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/ShrinesPlacehold: Static placeholder screen for the Shrines of Power feature listing four upcoming shrine types with animated icons and a 'Coming Soon' badge.
frontend/src/components/XPBar.tsx: Displays a character's XP progress toward the next level as a styled progress bar, supporting both compact (inline) and full (with labels) display modes.
frontend/src/data/abilities.ts: Defines the Ability type and exports the ABILITIES array containing all combat abilities (e.g., Power Strike, Fireball, Backstab) with damage multipliers, scaling stats, cooldowns, and display metadata.
frontend/src/data/monsters.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces and data pools for monster generation, including base monster templates, prefix/suffix modifiers, and stat adjustment values used to compose named monsters.
frontend/src/engine/combatEngine.ts: Implements the tick-based combat simulation engine, handling player and monster attack intervals, damage calculations, XP rewards, loot drops, and ability usage during dungeon encounters.
frontend/src/engine/lootGenerator.ts: Generates randomized loot items with rarity-weighted rolls, level-scaled affix values, and item-type-specific stat pools for weapons, armor, and trinkets.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHealthRegen.ts: React hook that regenerates player HP at a fixed rate outside of combat, using refs to avoid stale closures and periodically syncing the new HP value to the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, delegation validity, and exposing identity state to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalCharacter.ts: Custom React hook that manages a local character state by combining backend Character data with localStorage-persisted data (abilities, equipment, inventory). Handles HP calculation, starter equipment generation, and stat point tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including character CRUD, HP syncing, dungeon result submission, stat spending, and marketplace/user profile queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, imports Google Fonts (Cinzel, Inter), and defines CSS custom properties for the dark fantasy theme including colors for surfaces, rarities, and health bars.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/types/game.ts: Core game type definitions and pure utility functions including interfaces for stats, characters, and combat results, plus formulas for XP, level, HP, ability points, and stat point calculations.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with CSS variable-based colors, custom fonts (Inter, Cinzel), border radii, and animations for the dark fantasy UI.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for 'Abyss Ascendant' tracking a combat balance fix request to reduce monster defense/armor values by 80% so players deal meaningful damage to low-level enemies.
